info.name: SpaksTrip — Flight Sample Verification (LCC Domestic Return, 2A+1C+1I)
info.description:
TBO Air API Sample Verification flow per https://apidoc.tektravels.com/flight/SampleVerification.aspx

Scenario: LCC Domestic Return (JT=2), DEL ↔ BOM, 2 Adults + 1 Child + 1 Infant.

Flow (JT=2 produces two PNRs — one per leg):
  Authenticate → Search → FareRule(OB,IB) → FareQuote OB → FareQuote IB → SSR OB → SSR IB → Ticket OB → Ticket IB → GetBookingDetails OB → GetBookingDetails IB

Before running:
  1. Set collection variables TBO_USERNAME, TBO_PASSWORD (and END_USER_IP if not 1.1.1.1).
  2. Run steps in order — test scripts auto-capture TOKEN, TRACE_ID, ResultIndexes, per-pax fares, BookingIds, PNRs.
  3. After each step, copy the request + response into the matching files in sampleVerificationLogs/.
  4. Concatenate everything into sampleVerificationLogs/consolidated.txt and email it to TBO with subject 'Flight Sample verification - SpaksTrip'.

Rules followed (per sampleverification.aspx):
  · Same TokenId + TraceId across the session.
  · Same ResultIndex per leg throughout.
  · IsLeadPax true for exactly one passenger (Adult 1).
  · All passengers carry Gender, Title, AddressLine1, City, CountryCode, Nationality, CountryName.
  · Title matches Gender; male infant = 'Mstr'.
  · LCC SSR fields are arrays — and OMITTED entirely in Ticket since no SSR is selected for the sample.
  · Infant carries no Baggage / Seat SSR (Meal only, also omitted here).
  · Ticket per-pax BaseFare / Tax / YQTax = FareBreakdown value ÷ PassengerCount (auto-captured by FareQuote test scripts).

item.name: Sample Verification — LCC Domestic Return · 2A+1C+1I · DEL↔BOM (JT=2, two PNRs)

exec: function flatten(x) { return Array.isArray(x) ? x[0] : x; }
var lcc = arr.find(function (f) { var fl = flatten(f); return fl && fl.IsLCC === true; });
else if (pt === 2) { pm.collectionVariables.set('OB_CHD_BASE_FARE', b); pm.collectionVariables.set('OB_CHD_TAX', t); pm.collectionVariables.set('OB_CHD_YQ_TAX', y); }
else if (pt === 3) { pm.collectionVariables.set('OB_INF_BASE_FARE', b); pm.collectionVariables.set('OB_INF_TAX', t); pm.collectionVariables.set('OB_INF_YQ_TAX', y); }
console.log('OB FQ_TRACE_ID:', resp && resp.TraceId, 'OB FQ_RESULT_INDEX:', res && res.ResultIndex, 'OB IsLCC:', res && res.IsLCC);
else if (pt === 2) { pm.collectionVariables.set('IB_CHD_BASE_FARE', b); pm.collectionVariables.set('IB_CHD_TAX', t); pm.collectionVariables.set('IB_CHD_YQ_TAX', y); }
else if (pt === 3) { pm.collectionVariables.set('IB_INF_BASE_FARE', b); pm.collectionVariables.set('IB_INF_TAX', t); pm.collectionVariables.set('IB_INF_YQ_TAX', y); }
console.log('IB FQ_TRACE_ID:', resp && resp.TraceId, 'IB FQ_RESULT_INDEX:', res && res.ResultIndex, 'IB IsLCC:', res && res.IsLCC);

item.name: Step 6 — SSR OB (optional, not selected for sample)
Step 7 — SSR IB (optional, not selected for sample)
